name: Primoris Services Corp
summary: PART I Business Overview Primoris Services Corporation (Primoris, the Company, we, us, or our) is a leading provider of critical infrastructure services operating mainly in the United States and Canada. We provide a wide range of construction, maintenance, replacement, and engineering services to a diversified base of customers through our two segments: Utilities and Energy.
